summary:
Perfect! I have successfully identified and fixed the needle in the haystack. The issue was an off-by-one error in the `process_batch` function in `/app/processor.py`. 

The bug was on this line:
```python
end = start + batch_size - 1  # This was incorrect
```

This caused the slice `records[start:end]` to include one fewer item than intended because Python's slice notation excludes the end index. So when processing batches, one record per batch would be dropped.

I fixed it by changing the line to:
```python
end = start + batch_size  # Correct - includes exactly batch_size items
```

After applying the fix, I ran the test script and confirmed that all tests pass, meaning all records are now correctly processed without any being dropped at batch boundaries.
